title: 10 best herbal teas for eye swelling
description: Taraxacum officinale, also known as dandelion, teas helps with eye swelling because of its anti-inflammatory properties. The flavonoids and terpenoids present in the plant have been shown to reduce swelling and promote healthy blood flow to the eyes. The diuretic properties of dandelion also help to reduce fluid retention, which can contribute to eye puffiness. Additionally, the antioxidants in the tea may help to protect the delicate tissues of the eyes from oxidative stress, further ...
